values.content:
=You are an expert AI news analyst. You need to read all data from input which are related to news article with the following fields — Title, Link, Summary, Date, Source, Importance Score, and Virality Score — analyze the content and assign the most appropriate category from the list below. Base the decision on the subject matter of the Title and Summary, not just the source or keywords. retrun 7 news items. Please do not forget you always need to return 7 news articles and one should always be from Drone Defence & Uncrewed Systems if there is no drone news then return no drone news found, always return category field with output.


Ensure Drone Defence Coverage
From all articles, select only 7 stories.
Among these 7, at least one story must belong to Category 10 (Drone Defence & Uncrewed Systems).
If no Drone Defence story is present in the list, flag a warning: "⚠️ No Drone Defence story found. Please include at least one."


Now analyze the following JSON input:
**Input Data to Process:**
```
{{JSON.stringify($input.all().map(item => ({
  title: item.json.title || item.json.Title,
  summary: item.json.summary || item.json.Summary || item.json.contentSnippet,
  link: item.json.link || item.json.Link,
  source: item.json.source || item.json.Source,
  date: item.json.date || item.json.Date || item.json.pubDate,
  importance_score: item.json.importance_score,
  virality_score: item.json.virality_score,
  category: item.json.category || item.json.Category
})), null, 2)}}
```


Categories:

AI Research & Breakthroughs

Product Releases & Updates

Venture Capital & M&A

Corporate Strategy & Partnerships

Policy, Regulation & Governance

Ethics, Safety & Responsible AI

Cybersecurity & Privacy

Hardware & Infrastructure

Frontline Applications & Case Studies

Drone Defence & Uncrewed Systems


**Output Data should this list of objects which contains each item must contain the following fields:**

- id
- Title
- Link
- Summary
- Date
- Source
- category 
- importance_score
- virality_score



**CRITICAL: Your response must ONLY contain a valid JSON array. Do not include any explanatory text, markdown formatting, or additional commentary. Return ONLY the JSON array.**

You are an expert AI content writer specializing in summarizing technology news. Your output should be formatted for digital publication and should clearly present:

A concise, engaging summary paragraph

A source line with a clickable hyperlink

A lightbulb emoji 💡 followed by 5-line insight written in italic style

Make the language sharp, professional, and accessible. Avoid filler content.

=Summarize the article from the following HTML content:
{{ $json.link }}
{{ $json.content }}
Return the result as a JSON object with these two fields:

Summarized_content — include:

A bold title (use ** for markdown),

A one-paragraph summary,

A source link in markdown format ([text](url))

insight — write 5 key insights, each on a new line, in italic and start with the 💡 emoji.

Output format:

json
Copy
Edit
{
  "Summarized_content": "🧠 **Your Bold Headline Here**\n\nYour summary paragraph goes here...\n\n**Source:** [Link Text](https://example.com)",
  "insight": "💡 *Insight one.*\n💡 *Insight two.*\n💡 *Insight three.*\n💡 *Insight four.*\n💡 *Insight five.*"
}
Make the response clean, engaging, and formatted exactly like this for structured parsing.

nodes.name: Summarize + Add Insight for Each Article

parameters.html:
AC
The AI Citizen

Top AI & Tech News (Through {{ $('Clean + Analyze Articles for HTML').first().json.publishDate }})

AC

The AI Citizen

{{ $('Clean + Analyze Articles for HTML').first().json.publishDate }})

TOP AI & TECH NEWS

THROUGH {{ $('Clean + Analyze Articles for HTML').first().json.publishDate }})

Hello AI Citizens 🤖,

Before an AI model can write poetry, spot anomalies, or answer questions with human-like fluency, it must first learn—and that learning begins with data labeling. Data labeling is the essential process of tagging and organizing raw data (like images, audio, video, and text) so machines can make sense of the world. The quality, scale, and nuance of data labeling directly affect how accurate, ethical, and useful an AI model becomes. That's why tech giants like OpenAI, Meta, Google, and Anthropic spend hundreds of millions annually on labeling infrastructure—and why the recent rivalry between Meta-backed Scale AI and the quietly dominant, bootstrapped Surge AI is making headlines. As AI systems grow more sophisticated, labeling must evolve too—supporting not just classification but complex reasoning, emotional tone, bias identification, and even multi-modal context. It's the backbone of all generative breakthroughs, and it's why even the most powerful superintelligence starts with... a label.
Here are the key headlines shaping the AI & tech landscape:
  • {{ $json.articles[0].title }}
  • {{ $json.articles[1].title }}
  • {{ $json.articles[2].title }}
  • {{ $json.articles[3].title }}
  • {{ $json.articles[4].title }}
  • {{ $json.articles[5].title }}
